metadata.name: Unified Deployment Orchestration
metadata.purpose: Master orchestration script for all environment deployments with TypeScript mode selection and enterprise-grade validation
metadata.author: DevOps Team

executiveSummary.description: Comprehensive deployment orchestration supporting multiple TypeScript strictness modes (permissive, intermediate, staging, production) and environment-specific configurations. Includes pre-flight validation, automated builds, Docker orchestration, health monitoring, and rollback capabilities.
keyChanges: Automated health check validation with 60-attempt retry logic
prerequisites: Network ports available (3000 for dev, 4000 for staging)

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Docker CLI available
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure docker command is installed and in PATH
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates docker is available

onFailure.message: docker is not installed or not in PATH. Install Docker before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Node.js available
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure node command is installed and in PATH
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates node is available

onFailure.message: node is not installed or not in PATH. Install Node.js before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate pnpm available
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure pnpm package manager is installed
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates pnpm is available

onFailure.message: pnpm is not installed or not in PATH. Install pnpm before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate curl available
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure curl is available for health checks
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates curl is available

onFailure.message: curl is not installed or not in PATH. Install curl before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Docker Compose available
preFlightChecks.description: Check for docker-compose legacy command or docker compose plugin
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Either legacy docker-compose or docker compose plugin must be available

onFailure.message: docker-compose is not installed and docker compose plugin is not available. Install Docker Compose before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Docker daemon running
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates Docker daemon is running

onFailure.message: Docker daemon is not running. Start Docker daemon before proceeding.
package.json not found in project root. Verify working directory.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate TypeScript configuration
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure appropriate TypeScript config file exists for selected mode
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: At least one TypeScript configuration must exist

onFailure.message: TypeScript configuration not found. Ensure tsconfig files are present.

phases.name: Pre-Deployment Validation
phases.description: Validate all prerequisites and project structure before deployment

steps.name: Validate required tools
steps.description: Check that docker, node, pnpm, and curl are available
steps.command: for tool in docker node pnpm curl; do command -v $tool || exit 1; done
steps.purpose: Ensure all required CLI tools are installed

onFailure.message: Required tools missing. Install docker, node, pnpm, and curl.

steps.name: Check Docker Compose availability
steps.description: Verify either docker-compose legacy or docker compose plugin is available
steps.purpose: Ensure Docker Compose is available for orchestration

onFailure.message: Docker Compose not available. Install docker-compose or use Docker with compose plugin.

steps.name: Validate Docker daemon
steps.description: Ensure Docker daemon is running and accessible
steps.purpose: Check Docker daemon status

onFailure.message: Docker daemon is not running. Start Docker and retry.

steps.name: Validate project structure
steps.description: Check that package.json exists in project root
steps.purpose: Verify we're in the correct project directory

onFailure.message: package.json not found. Verify working directory is project root.

steps.name: Validate TypeScript configuration
steps.description: Ensure TypeScript config file exists for selected mode
steps.purpose: Verify TypeScript configuration is available

validation.criteria: TypeScript config must exist for mode

onFailure.message: TypeScript configuration not found for selected mode.

steps.name: Check environment template
steps.description: Verify environment template exists for deployment mode
steps.purpose: Validate environment configuration availability

onFailure.message: Environment template not found, but deployment can continue.

steps.name: Validate TypeScript build
steps.description: Run TypeScript type checking for selected mode
steps.purpose: Ensure code compiles without TypeScript errors

onFailure.message: TypeScript validation failed. Fix type errors before deploying.

steps.name: Check network ports
steps.description: Verify required ports are available
steps.purpose: Ensure deployment ports are not in use

validation.criteria: Port should not be in use

onFailure.message: Port is already in use. Deployment may fail or require port change.

phases.name: Backup Creation
phases.description: Create deployment backup for rollback capability

steps.name: Create backup of Docker Compose file
steps.description: Backup current compose configuration
steps.purpose: Enable quick rollback to previous configuration

onFailure.message: Backup creation failed, but deployment can continue.

phases.name: Application Build
phases.description: Build application with selected TypeScript mode

steps.name: Clean previous builds (if force rebuild)
steps.description: Remove previous build artifacts if FORCE_REBUILD=true
steps.purpose: Ensure fresh build without cached artifacts

onFailure.message: Clean failed, but build can continue.

steps.name: Install dependencies
steps.description: Install npm dependencies with frozen lockfile
steps.purpose: Ensure consistent dependency versions

onFailure.message: Dependency installation failed. Check network and pnpm-lock.yaml.

steps.name: Build with permissive TypeScript
steps.description: Build application using permissive TypeScript configuration
steps.purpose: Compile application for permissive or intermediate mode

onFailure.message: Build failed. Check TypeScript errors and dependencies.

steps.name: Build with staging/strict TypeScript
steps.description: Build application using strict TypeScript configuration
steps.purpose: Compile application for staging or strict mode

validation.criteria: Build must complete successfully with strict checks

onFailure.message: Strict build failed. Fix TypeScript errors before deploying to staging.

steps.name: Build with production TypeScript
steps.description: Build application using production TypeScript configuration
steps.purpose: Compile application for production with optimizations

onFailure.message: Production build failed. Fix errors before deploying to production.

steps.name: Validate Docker Compose file exists
steps.description: Ensure compose file for deployment mode exists
steps.purpose: Verify compose configuration is available

onFailure.message: Docker Compose file not found for selected mode.

steps.name: Stop existing deployment
steps.description: Gracefully stop running containers
steps.purpose: Clean up existing deployment before starting new one

onFailure.message: Failed to stop containers. Retrying...

steps.name: Prune Docker resources
steps.description: Remove unused Docker resources
steps.purpose: Free up disk space and remove dangling resources

onFailure.message: Prune failed, but deployment can continue.

steps.name: Set deployment environment variables
steps.description: Export environment variables for Docker Compose
steps.purpose: Configure runtime environment for containers

onFailure.message: Failed to set environment variables.

steps.name: Start core infrastructure services
steps.description: Deploy postgres and redis first (infrastructure-first strategy)
steps.purpose: Ensure databases are ready before application services

onFailure.message: Infrastructure services failed to start.

steps.name: Wait for databases to initialize
steps.description: Allow 20 seconds for database initialization
steps.purpose: Ensure databases are fully ready before starting apps

onFailure.message: Wait interrupted, but deployment continues.

steps.name: Deploy all application services
steps.description: Start all services with build
steps.purpose: Build and start all application containers

onFailure.message: Application services failed to start. Initiating rollback.

phases.name: Health Check Validation
phases.description: Wait for services to be healthy and validate deployment

steps.name: Wait for API Gateway health
steps.description: Retry health check up to 60 times with 10s intervals
steps.command: for i in {1..60}; do curl -sf http://localhost:${PORT}/health && break || sleep 10; done
steps.purpose: Ensure API Gateway is healthy before proceeding

onFailure.message: Health check timeout, but deployment may still be starting.

steps.name: Fallback: Check if API Gateway responds
steps.description: If /health fails, try root endpoint
steps.purpose: Alternative check if health endpoint not available

onFailure.message: API Gateway not responding on root endpoint either.

phases.name: Deployment Validation
phases.description: Validate deployment success and test endpoints

steps.name: Check container status
steps.description: Count running vs total containers
steps.purpose: Verify all containers are running

validation.criteria: All expected services should be running

onFailure.message: Some containers not running. Check logs.

steps.name: Test health endpoint
steps.description: Verify health endpoint is accessible
steps.purpose: Validate API Gateway health check

onFailure.message: Health endpoint not accessible.

steps.name: Test root endpoint
steps.description: Verify root endpoint is accessible
steps.purpose: Validate application is serving requests

onFailure.message: Root endpoint not accessible. Application may still be starting.

steps.name: Generate deployment summary
steps.description: Display deployment configuration and access URLs
steps.command: echo 'Deployment completed. Check logs for details.'
steps.purpose: Provide deployment summary to operator

onFailure.message: Summary generation failed, but deployment succeeded.

smokeTests.test: API Gateway responds to health check

performanceThresholds.measurement: Time from docker up to healthy state

dataIntegrity.validation: Volumes preserved if not using --volumes flag

triggerConditions: Health checks fail after 60 attempts (10 minutes)

steps.name: Stop failed deployment
steps.purpose: Halt current deployment

steps.name: Restore backup configuration
steps.purpose: Revert to previous compose configuration

steps.name: Restart previous deployment
steps.purpose: Start previous stable version

steps.name: Verify rollback health
steps.purpose: Confirm rollback successful

verification.successCriteria: All containers healthy and health endpoint returns 200

alertThresholds.action: Check container logs for crash reason

successCriteria.criterion: All required tools available (docker, node, pnpm, curl)
TypeScript compilation succeeds for selected mode
successCriteria.validation: pnpm run type-check:${MODE} returns exit code 0
pnpm run build returns exit code 0

successCriteria.criterion: All containers start and reach healthy state
successCriteria.validation: docker compose ps shows all services 'Up'

successCriteria.criterion: No critical errors in container logs
successCriteria.validation: docker logs shows no ERROR or FATAL messages
Backup file exists in project directory

supportedQueries.returns: Array of deployment phases with steps
supportedQueries.purpose: Retrieve ordered deployment steps for execution
Get environment, strictness, config file, compose file, and port for mode
Determine which tsconfig to use for given mode

supportedQueries.returns: Array of health check endpoints and criteria

decisionSupport: Recommend TypeScript mode based on environment (permissive for dev, strict for staging/production)
Suggest rollback if health checks fail after max attempts
Calculate estimated deployment time based on phases

knownIssues.title: Health check may timeout on slow systems
knownIssues.impact: Warning displayed but deployment may succeed
knownIssues.mitigation: Script continues and validates with fallback endpoints
knownIssues.action: Monitor container logs to verify actual status

knownIssues.title: Port conflicts if previous deployment not cleaned
knownIssues.impact: Deployment may fail if ports in use
knownIssues.mitigation: Script runs 'docker compose down' before deployment
knownIssues.action: Manually stop conflicting services if needed

knownIssues.title: TypeScript strict mode may fail on legacy code
knownIssues.mitigation: Use permissive or intermediate mode for development
knownIssues.action: Fix TypeScript errors before deploying to staging

required.name: TYPESCRIPT_MODE
required.description: TypeScript strictness mode (permissive, intermediate, staging, production)

required.name: DRY_RUN
required.description: Dry run mode (true/false) - shows commands without executing

permissive.description: Development mode with permissive TypeScript for rapid iteration

intermediate.description: Development mode with intermediate TypeScript checks

staging.description: Staging environment with strict TypeScript validation

production.description: Production environment with strict TypeScript and optimizations

log.description: Standard timestamped log message to console and file

getDeploymentConfig.description: Returns space-separated configuration for deployment mode

getTypescriptConfig.description: Returns TypeScript config file path for mode

getDockerComposeCmd.description: Determines which docker compose command to use
getDockerComposeCmd.logic: Checks for legacy docker-compose, falls back to docker compose plugin
